name: efficient_planning_batch_campaign_constraints
notes: Efficient planning: ONE message carries three constraints for a win-back ask at once (a time window, a discount cap, and an exclusion rule). The manager must proceed using all three rather than interrogating them back one at a time across separate turns. Step 1 accepts EITHER honest outcome (a real drafted plan given the seeded cohort, OR an honest insufficient-data reply if the activation gate didn't clear this run — same dependency pattern as delegation_winback_plan.json); the assertion that matters here is the NON-re-ask of constraints already stated. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> efficient_planning_batch_campaign_constraints.json`.

steps.message: Set up a win-back campaign for anyone who hasn't ordered in 60 days, keep any discount under 15%, and skip anyone who's complained before
assert_not_contains: how many days since their last order
steps.note: Three constraints (window/discount-cap/exclusion) in ONE message. Expect the manager to proceed (delegate/plan or an honest data-gap reply) WITHOUT re-asking any of the three constraints individually — batch, don't interrogate.
